Video.summary: Road trip across California to experience the quirky, undiscovered, pop culture landmarks of the USA’s road trip capital.
Video.title: California Pop

Video.summary: Jonathan Thompson explores the adventurous side of St. Petersburg Clearwater, Florida; Charleston, South Carolina; and Juneau, Alaska.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore how Latinx culture brings American cities to life, through the stories of those who embrace their roots and shape the future.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jaunt through Zion National Park.
Video.title: Viva Adventure! - Las Vegas, Nevada

Video.summary: From vintage planes to miniature trains, adventure comes in all sizes, just a short drive from New York City.
Video.title: Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York

Image.alt: Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York
Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York
Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York

Video.summary: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?
Video.title: Trust Me!

Video.summary: Orlando can be a gateway to all sorts of surprising adventures.
Video.title: Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida

Image.alt: Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida
Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida
Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida

Video.summary: Relive the golden age of Hollywood.
Video.title: From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California

Image.alt: From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California
From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California
From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California

Video.summary: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.
Video.title: Discovering Home

Video.summary: After climbing the Grand Teton, the couple head to Utah where a change of plans has them trading in their climbing shoes for an ATV. They take on Hells Revenge, a 4x4 trail only recommended for extremely experienced drivers...which they are not.
Video.title: Hell's Revenge

Video.summary: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke set out to meet local singles in outdoorsy Denver, Colorado.
Video.title: United Dates of America: Denver

Video.summary: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke head south to meet local singles in young and vibrant Charlotte, North Carolina.
Video.title: United Dates of America: Charlotte

Video.summary: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke try their luck dating in artsy Providence, Rhode Island.
Video.title: United Dates of America: Providence

Video.summary: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America’s oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.
Video.title: The Main Event: Alabama

Video.summary: Myrtle Beach’s local restaurants Johnny D’s and Winna’s Kitchen go head-to-head in a Breakfast Chef Swap Challenge
Video.grandparentTitle: Chef Swap at the Beach: Johnny D’s vs. Winna’s Kitchen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Photographer Chad Case and videographer Jonathan Conti take you on an epic adventure through Idaho.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city’s heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There’s this ‘all senses on overload’ side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A film about one of the most important and unknown forces in music: The Nashville Songwriter. With over 50 masters: Ben Folds, Garth Brooks, Brad Paisley, Luke Bryan, Rodney Crowell, Kacey Musgraves, John Hiatt, Keb Mo, Liz Rose, Claude Kelly and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: It All Begins With A Song
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Musicians Foy Vance and Laetitia Sheriff head to the US to discover some of the country's most iconic cities.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF’s Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly’s ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky’s own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly’s horse wins the race. At Louisville’s Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America’s most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
Video.title: National Parks Adventure

Video.summary: The Ellis Family road trips to the Grand Canyon and Zion National Park in search of some outdoor fun.
Video.title: Ellis Family Vacation: Grand Canyon

Video.summary: The Ellis Family ventures to the Big Easy, soaking up the culture of New Orleans with jazz, beignets, airboat adventures, and more.
Video.title: Ellis Family Vacation: New Orleans

Video.summary: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Key West & Wrightsville

Video.summary: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach

Image.alt: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach

Video.summary: Tyler and Monica head to Virginia Beach where they’re tasked by celebrity chef Cliff Crooks to create the ultimate cheat meal for a local restaurateur. Armed with the power of their taste buds, the dynamic duo checks out the best places to eat, including Oishii Burger, Chick’s Oyster Bar and Klassic Doughnuts, to build an off-the-charts meal of epic portions.
Video.title: Cheat Meal: Virginia Beach, Part 1

Video.summary: Tyler and Monica dive back into Virginia Beach's vibrant food scene to build the ultimate cheat meal for George Culver, the food-loving force behind the popular @iheartfoodvb. From the tropical vibes at Moxy Virginia Beach to the game-filled hangouts at Beachside Social, and the delightful flavors of Oh Mochi, De Rican Chef, and Belvedere South, they pull out all the stops to craft a meal that’s as unforgettable as it is indulgent!
Video.title: Cheat Meal: Virginia Beach, Part 2

Video.summary: Tyler and Monica head to Galveston, Texas, to create a fiery feast for Concetta, the spice-obsessed owner of Maceo Spice & Import Co. From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Mario’s Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.
Video.title: Cheat Meal: Galveston

Video.summary: Eric travels to the mountain towns of Durango and Telluride, Colorado to explore the backcountry by ski, snowshoe, and ice axe.
Video.title: Backpacking Durango, Colorado

Video.summary: Eric Hanson seeks new adventures on the Maah Daah Hey Trail in North Dakota's Theodore Roosevelt National Park.
Video.title: NORTH DAKOTA

Video.summary: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!
Video.title: FOUR CORNERS: ARIZONA

Video.summary: For this episode, Ben’s planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?
Video.title: FOUR CORNERS: UTAH

Video.summary: This time, Mike’s planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he’ll get on??!
Video.title: FOUR CORNERS: NEW MEXICO

Video.summary: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it’s Barry’s turn, and he’s not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!
Video.title: FOUR CORNERS: COLORADO

Video.summary: Lou hooks up with keyboardist Patric Johnston while Summer records an original song at a legendary recording studio. Phanie learns about the multicultural history of the accordion aka Texas squeezebox.
Video.title: Innovations

Video.summary: Phanie gets a lesson in the bajo sexto, a 12-stringed guitar, while Lou meets the owner of Houston’s independent record shop Vinal Edge. Summer tries her hand at graffiti art.
Video.title: History Inspires

Video.summary: Summer jams with Nathen Rogers and his band, La Croix Boix. Lou gets a tour of Sugarhill Recording Studio and Phanie’s punk band plays alongside the accordion-powered Tex Mex band Pińata Protest.
Video.title: The Scene

Video.summary: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it’s vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: American Beats: Traditional African Music

Video.summary: Touring Delaware, Raheim pushes Tatyanna to her limits above the trees before coming back to the ground to get a little history lesson and a fantastic local brew. And in this episode of firsts, Raheim is on his own to catch some waves.
Video.title: Wilmington, Delaware: Surf's Up

Video.summary: Raheim Robinson meets up with his buddy Clark Robinson (and no, they’re not related) to see if their shared passion for outdoor adventures will endure three climates across three Counties in three days.
Video.title: Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah

Image.alt: Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah
Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah
Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah

Video.summary: In El Paso, Texas, Raheim coaches new mom and aspiring mountain biker Isabel as she rides rocky desert descents in the Franklin Mountains. Then, Raheim visits an ancient bouldering field, Hueco Tanks, home to wild west graffiti and rock art.
Video.title: El Paso: Conquering Mountains

Video.summary: Chef Ben and the gang arrive in Texas’ BIGGEST city, Houston. With new challenges in store, will they level the leaderboard?
Video.grandparentTitle: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
Video.title: Houston Part 1

Video.summary: The Sorted guys go head to head in a street food fusion battle in Texas’ BIGGEST city, Houston. Who will come out on top?!
Video.grandparentTitle: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
Video.title: Houston Part 2

Video.summary: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.
Video.title: American Beats: Polka Music

Video.summary: Kansas City, Missouri, is an integral part of jazz history in America. Shaped by legends who once graced its streets, it is bursting with deep history, mouth-watering cuisine and a lively jazz scene. World-renowned trumpeter, tap dancer, and entertainer, Lonnie McFadden and celebrated singer and tap dancer Chloe McFadden, show Chunz and Makh what it’s all about. From finger-licking barbecue to sports events and a bustling nightlife, this city is a cultural hub offering endless opportunities for a fun-filled getaway.
Video.title: American Beats: Jazz Music

Video.summary: In mile-high alpine forests near Grand Junction, Raheim encourages IT analyst Bill to get back on the bike following an accident that left him with multiple broken bones. They also ride ski lifts, kayak lakes of snowmelt, and sip lavender gin.
Video.title: Grand Junction: Bill’s Spill

Video.summary: Las cosas se complican cuando Ciao y Drift se enfrentan en un "Desafío de Intercambio de Almuerzos".
Video.grandparentTitle: Intercambio de Chefs en la Playa: Ciao v Drift
Video.title: Episode 1
